meta.disclaimer: All identities, aircraft registrations, numbers, capacities, schedules, provider responses, and operational details are synthetic demo data. Do not use this data for real flight planning, safety decisions, regulatory compliance, or external communication.
meta.rbacNote: Demo-only RBAC fixture. Frontend controls are for demo UX; production enforcement must be server-side.

roles.name: Platform Administrator
roles.description: Mengelola user, role, entitlement modul, dan audit. Tidak memiliki hak dispatch secara otomatis.

roles.name: Operations Manager
roles.description: Melihat operasi lintas station, mengescalate exception, dan meninjau approval kritis.

roles.name: Flight Coordinator
roles.description: Membuat dan menyiapkan Flight Request. Tidak dapat menyetujui request yang dibuat sendiri.

roles.name: OCC Staff
roles.description: Menjalankan flight following manual, mencatat departure/airborne/delay, dan membuat closure data.

roles.name: Chief of Pilot
roles.description: Mengesahkan kesesuaian crew dan melakukan approval dispatch apabila semua readiness lolos.

roles.name: Station Operations
roles.description: Mengelola readiness/handling/arrival di station yang menjadi scope-nya.

roles.name: Sales & Ticketing
roles.description: Membuat dan mengonfirmasi booking atau transport request, tanpa mengendalikan dispatch.

roles.name: Finance Reviewer
roles.description: Melihat dan meninjau handoff closure dari operasi. Tidak dapat mengubah flight.

roles.name: Maintenance Controller
roles.description: Memperbarui fleet readiness dan meninjau post-flight maintenance handoff.

roles.name: Pilot Self Service
roles.description: Hanya melihat roster dan assignment pribadi pada demo.

flightRequests.title: Extra passenger + cargo flight DJJ → WMX

flightRequests.notes: Medevac is deliberately blocked in demo to show urgency, fuel inventory constraint, and duty-time conflict.

flightRequests.title: Corporate charter cargo DJJ → OKS
flightRequests.notes: Blocked because assigned pilot lacks valid qualification for PAC 750XL in the fixture, and destination parking is still pending.

flightRequests.title: Scheduled operating flight DJJ → WMX
flightRequests.notes: Used to populate Flight Following Board with an active flight.

tenant.name: PT AMA Operations Demo
tenant.notes: Single tenant means this deployment has one operator organisation. Keep a tenant context abstraction, but do not add tenant selection or cross-tenant UI to this demo.

moduleCatalog.name: Core Platform & Security
moduleCatalog.description: Identity, access control, audit trail, dashboard shell, dan notification foundation.

moduleCatalog.name: Operations Control
moduleCatalog.description: Flight Request, readiness, dispatch approval, flight following, delay, dan closure.

moduleCatalog.name: Station Operations
moduleCatalog.description: Kesiapan station, ground handling, parking, arrival update, dan closure draft.

moduleCatalog.name: Crew Compliance
moduleCatalog.description: Kualifikasi crew, lisensi, medical, training, availability, dan duty-time check.

moduleCatalog.name: Fleet Readiness
moduleCatalog.description: Aircraft availability, airworthiness/documents, and maintenance status summary.

moduleCatalog.name: Commercial Booking Intake
moduleCatalog.description: Website ticketing, agent, cargo, charter, dan medevac request sebagai sumber demand.

moduleCatalog.name: Partner Confirmations (Mock)
moduleCatalog.description: Simulasi fuel confirmation dan airport handling/parking. Bukan integrasi pihak ketiga.

moduleCatalog.name: Finance Handoff
moduleCatalog.description: Handoff ringkas flight closure ke Finance; belum membentuk invoice atau jurnal.

moduleCatalog.name: Maintenance Handoff
moduleCatalog.description: Handoff actual flight/defect report ke Maintenance; belum menggantikan maintenance planning.

moduleCatalog.name: Operations Reporting
moduleCatalog.description: Punctuality, cancellations, utilization, recurring blockers, dan exception analysis.

Melihat audit trail, tanpa dapat mengubahnya.
Mengelola user demo, activation, dan assignment role.
Mengelola role dan permission template demo.
Mengonfirmasi booking untuk dipertimbangkan oleh operasi.
Mengubah draft/planning request yang berada dalam scope.
Memberi approval dispatch ketika readiness lulus.
Mengubah request yang approved menjadi flight.
Memperbarui status flight sesuai transition policy.
Memperbarui kesiapan station pada scope station.
Mengonfirmasi handling mock untuk station scope.
Mencatat arrival/landing pada flight terkait station.
Melihat availability, qualification, dan duty status crew.
Crew hanya dapat melihat roster/assignment diri sendiri.
Mengubah hasil konfirmasi fuel mock (khusus persona/provider simulator).
Melihat data flight closure yang siap direview Finance.
Menandai handoff Finance sebagai reviewed di demo.
Menandai handoff Maintenance sebagai reviewed di demo.

authorizationOrder: 3. User must have at least one role containing the required permission.
4. User's station scope must cover the related origin/destination/assigned station.
5. Conditional policy and valid entity state transition must pass.
6. The action must be written to auditEvents after successful mutation.

stationScopeRule.flightRequest: A user with ASSIGNED_STATIONS scope can view/edit a request only when origin OR destination station is in stationScopeIds. Approve/dispatch requires ALL_STATIONS role scope.
stationScopeRule.flight: A Station Operations user can update arrival/handling only where the current origin or destination station is in stationScopeIds.
stationScopeRule.crew: Pilot role is SELF_ONLY and can only read the crew record referenced by selfCrewId.

conditionalPolicies.name: No self-approval
conditionalPolicies.message: Pembuat Flight Request tidak dapat menyetujui request miliknya sendiri.

conditionalPolicies.name: Readiness gate
conditionalPolicies.rule: approval and dispatch release require readiness.overallState !== BLOCKER
conditionalPolicies.message: Approval dan dispatch tidak tersedia selama masih ada readiness blocker.

conditionalPolicies.name: Valid flight transition
conditionalPolicies.rule: Flight status may move only according to flightTransitionMatrix
conditionalPolicies.message: Status flight tidak dapat melompati tahapan operasi.

conditionalPolicies.name: Station limitation
conditionalPolicies.rule: Station Operations can only confirm handling and update landing/arrival for a scoped station.
conditionalPolicies.message: Aksi ini hanya tersedia untuk station dalam scope Anda.

conditionalPolicies.name: Mandatory reason
conditionalPolicies.rule: Reject, delay, manual status correction, and closure incident flag require a non-empty reason/note.

conditionalPolicies.name: Critical exception separation
conditionalPolicies.rule: A CRITICAL exception cannot be silently overridden. In demo it stays blocked; production design should require Chief of Pilot plus Operations Manager approval and a mandatory audit reason.
conditionalPolicies.message: Critical exception tidak dapat dibypass pada demo.

modules.description: Flight request, readiness, dispatch approval, flight following, closure.

modules.description: Fuel request and mock fuel confirmation workflow.

modules.name: Booking Intake
modules.description: Ticketing, cargo, charter, and medevac requests entering operations.

permissions.description: View flight requests within allowed scope
Update station readiness within assigned station
Confirm mock fuel at allowed station
Manage users and role assignments in future phase
Manage roles and permission mapping in future phase

authorization.notes: Roles grant permission candidates. Policy functions evaluate station scope, workflow state, ownership/separation of duties, and operational context. Readiness engine separately determines whether the operation can proceed.

policyCatalog.description: Actor may view a request when they have the required permission and are assigned to origin/destination station, or have all-station visibility.
Flight Coordinator can edit only draft/planning/blocked requests in their station scope; final or converted requests are immutable.
Request can be submitted only by authorized coordinator while it is editable and has mandatory operational fields.
Approver must be authorized, cannot approve their own request, and operational readiness must be clear.
Only OCC or station user in applicable route scope can apply an allowed manual state transition.
Flight can be closed only after landed state and actual arrival data are present.
Station Operations can confirm only a handling record belonging to their assigned station.
Fuel confirmation requires fuel permission and origin/uplift station scope.

nonOverridableSafetyRules: Aircraft must be available and documents valid.
Assigned pilot qualification must be valid for assigned aircraft.
Required fuel confirmation must meet requested quantity and validity time.
Medevac aircraft must have required configured medical capability.
Readiness blocker cannot be bypassed by a generic force-approve button.

authRoles.name: System Administrator
authRoles.description: Demo configuration and access management. Not an operational dispatch approver by default.

authRoles.name: Flight Coordinator
authRoles.description: Creates and prepares operational requests; cannot approve own request.

authRoles.name: OCC Staff
authRoles.description: Monitors operations and records valid flight-following/closure updates.

authRoles.name: Chief of Pilot
authRoles.description: Approves qualified, ready dispatch requests; has broad operational visibility.

authRoles.name: Operations Manager
authRoles.description: Broad oversight; may approve configured non-safety workflow exceptions with reason.

authRoles.name: Station Operations
authRoles.description: Updates station/handling and arrival information only for assigned stations.

authRoles.name: Finance Reviewer
authRoles.description: Read-only closure and finance handoff reviewer.

authRoles.name: Maintenance Reviewer
authRoles.description: Read-only closure and maintenance handoff reviewer.

legacyRolesNote: For compatibility with earlier fixture. Prefer authUsers/authRoles/permissions/authorization for new implementation.
